editions.lead_headline: Nobody Ends a War. A Master Persuader Buys Sixty Days.
editions.lead_dek: The Iran deal isn't a peace agreement. It's an anchor. And if you know how anchors work, you already know how this ends.

editions.lead_headline: A Tower of Stone, and Six Who Came to Be Heard
editions.lead_dek: What the old man saw in Spain, walking past the parliament to the masons and the migrants and the wounded.
